body:
Day/night cycle implemented in game scene (#48):
- nightPhase variable (0→1, dusk→deep night over ~5 min)
- night overlay darkens scene up to 55%
- Window lamp glow intensifies (0.13 → 0.68) and warms up at night
- VISTA_SWAP hook ready for second vista sprite
- Yonidavidson-ee9f needs image review on 3 asset sets (rock pile, debris, bushes) — forwarded earlier
